declarations.description:
Modelo base para componentes de lista.
Usamos la configuración estática para evitar errores de decoradores en clases abstractas.
declarations.name: LibListModel

members.description: Método obligatorio: define cómo se renderiza cada ítem.

declarations.name: generateUniqueId

parameters.name: prefix
parameters.description: An optional prefix for the ID. Defaults to 'lib-id-'.

declarations.description:
Generates a unique ID for a component or element.
Useful for associating elements via ARIA attributes (e.g., `aria-labelledby`, `aria-describedby`).

declarations.name: getAriaLabel

parameters.name: defaultValue
parameters.description: A fallback value to use if `aria-label` is not found.

declarations.description:
Retrieves the `aria-label` attribute from an HTMLElement.
Provides a default fallback if `aria-label` is not explicitly set.
This function is meant to be used in conjunction with components that may not always have a visual label.

attributes.description: Si es true, solo un ítem puede estar abierto a la vez.

declarations.name: meta
declarations.default: { title: 'Display/Accordion', component: 'lib-accordion', argTypes: { exclusive: { control: 'boolean' }, }, }

declarations.name: Default
declarations.default: { args: { exclusive: false, }, render: (args) => renderTemplate(args), }

declarations.name: Exclusive
declarations.default: { args: { exclusive: true, }, render: (args) => renderTemplate(args), }

declarations.name: meta
declarations.default: { title: 'Display/Carousel', component: 'lib-carousel', }

declarations.name: Default
declarations.default:
{ render: () => html`
Slide 1
Slide 2
Slide 3
`, }

declarations.name: meta
declarations.default: { title: 'Organisms/Data Table', component: 'lib-data-table', }

declarations.name: Default
declarations.default:
{ args: { columns: [ { header: 'Usuario', key: 'name', sortable: true }, { header: 'Estado', key: 'status', type: 'badge' }, { header: 'Progreso', key: 'progress', type: 'progress' }, { header: 'Acciones', key: 'actions', type: 'action' } ], data: [ { name: 'Alex Marín', status: 'Activo', variant: 'success', progress: 85 }, { name: 'Elena Pozo', status: 'Pendiente', variant: 'warning', progress: 40 }, { name: 'Marc Soto', status: 'Error', variant: 'error', progress: 15 }, { name: 'Sonia Gil', status: 'Inactivo', variant: 'neutral', progress: 100 } ] }, render: (args) => html`
` }

declarations.name: meta
declarations.default: { title: 'Feedback/Dialog', component: 'lib-dialog', argTypes: { title: { control: 'text' }, open: { control: 'boolean' }, }, }

declarations.name: Default
declarations.default:
{ render: (args: DialogArgs): TemplateResult => html`
Abrir Modal Simple

Contenido...

Cancelar
`, args: { title: 'Información del Sistema', open: false, }, }

declarations.name: SearchError
declarations.default:
{ render: ():TemplateResult => html`
Simular Error de Búsqueda

No se encontraron resultados

Lo sentimos, la búsqueda "Zapatillas de cristal" no devolvió ningún producto. Prueba con términos más generales.

Entendido
`, }

declarations.name: meta
declarations.default: { title: 'Organisms/Drawer', component: 'lib-drawer', argTypes: { open: { control: 'boolean' }, placement: { control: 'select', options: ['left', 'right'] }, } }

declarations.name: Interactive
declarations.default:
{ args: { open: false, placement: 'right', label: 'Configuración de Usuario' }, render: (args) => { const toggleDrawer = ():void => { const drawer = document.querySelector('lib-drawer') as LibDrawer; if (drawer) { drawer.open = !drawer.open; } }; return html`
{ args.open = false; }} >

¡Ahora sí! El panel debería deslizarse correctamente desde el lateral.
`; } }

declarations.name: meta
declarations.default: { title: 'Forms/Auth Form', component: 'lib-auth-form', argTypes: { glass: { control: 'boolean' }, loading: { control: 'boolean' }, title: { control: 'text' }, }, // Esto captura el evento que definimos en el componente parameters: { actions: { handles: ['lib-auth-submit'], }, }, }

declarations.name: Login
declarations.default:
{ args: { glass: false, title: 'Área de Clientes', loading: false, }, render: (args) => html`
Crear cuenta ¿Olvidaste tu clave?
` }

members.name: layout
members.description:
Define la disposición: 
'grid' (rejilla responsiva) o 'block' (lista vertical)

members.name: renderBase
members.description: Helper para que el archivo .html pueda invocar el render del padre

members.name: renderItem
members.description:
En el organismo no iteramos datos visualmente aquí, 
dejamos que el slot proyecte las moléculas.

members.name: renderSkeleton
members.description:
Implementación del esqueleto para el organismo.
Usamos el átomo lib-skeleton que ya tenemos creado.

attributes.name: layout
attributes.description:
Define la disposición: 
'grid' (rejilla responsiva) o 'block' (lista vertical)

declarations.name: meta
declarations.default: { title: 'Display/List', component: 'lib-list', argTypes: { layout: { control: 'select', options: ['grid', 'block'], }, loading: { control: 'boolean' }, skeletonCount: { control: 'number' }, }, }

declarations.name: GridWithCards
declarations.default: { args: { layout: 'grid', loading: false, skeletonCount: 6, }, render: (args) => html` <lib-list layout=${args.layout} ?loading=${args.loading} .skeletonCount=${args.skeletonCount} > <lib-profile-card name="Alex" role="Frontend" avatarSrc="https://i.pravatar.cc/150?u=1"> </lib-profile-card> <lib-profile-card name="Sam" role="UI Designer" avatarSrc="https://i.pravatar.cc/150?u=2"> </lib-profile-card> <lib-profile-card name="Jordan" role="DevOps" avatarSrc="https://i.pravatar.cc/150?u=3"> </lib-profile-card> </lib-list> `, }

declarations.name: meta
declarations.default: { title: 'Navigation/Stepper', component: 'lib-stepper', argTypes: { currentStep: { control: { type: 'number', min: 1, max: 3 } } } }

declarations.name: Default
declarations.default: { args: { currentStep: 1 }, render: (args) => html` <lib-stepper .currentStep=${args.currentStep}> <lib-step label="Envío"></lib-step> <lib-step label="Pago"></lib-step> <lib-step label="Confirmación"></lib-step> </lib-stepper> ` }

declarations.name: meta
declarations.default: { title: 'Display/Timeline', }

declarations.name: Default
declarations.default:
{ render: () => html`
Pedido Entregado Finalizado

El cliente ha recibido el paquete satisfactoriamente.

 En Tránsito

El envío ha salido de la delegación de Madrid hacia el destino final.

 Pedido Registrado

Hemos recibido la solicitud y estamos procesando el pago.
` }
